title: SCP:Crafting Breach
description: Adding useful and not SCP Objects to minecraft!
body:
**![Description banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/052f9771c0951fef52f8a8da22c25109a8132d5f_0.webp)**

This mod aims at adding utility SCPS, Mostly from SCP:CB and SCP:SL
Ranging from useful to not so,
mod is in early stage of developement and is very simple, so if you want a real scp mod i reccomend installing SCP:Overtime with this.

_Remember that the mod is in beta and everything is subject to change_

This mod was made using MCreator, won't get updated regulary

<details>
<summary>Available SCP'S List</summary>

**SCP-1499** "Gas-Mask"

**SCP-035**  "Possesive Mask"

**SCP-2814** "Heretic of the torch"

**SCP-268**  "Invisibility Cap"

**SCP-207**  "Cola bottle"

**SCP-1230** "Dream Book"

**SCP-500**  "All-Healing Pills"
 
**SCP-420-J** "Awesome Dope"

**SCP-1025**  "The Encyclopedia of Common Diseases"

**SCP-427** "Lovecraftian Locket"

**SCP-458** "Infinite Pizza Box"

</details>
